title: RepairDesk Alternatives for India: 5 Better Options in 2026
excerpt: RepairDesk costs ₹6,200/month and lacks GST billing and WhatsApp. Here are 5 better alternatives for Indian mobile repair shops — including a complete comparison.
content:
## Why Indian Repair Shop Owners Are Leaving RepairDesk

RepairDesk is a solid repair shop management tool built primarily for US, UK, and Australian shops. But for Indian repair shop owners, it has three major problems:

1. **Price**: Starts at $75/month (~₹6,200). That is 6× more expensive than purpose-built Indian alternatives.
2. **No WhatsApp**: In India, WhatsApp is how customers expect to be updated. RepairDesk has no native WhatsApp notifications.
3. **No GST billing**: RepairDesk does not generate CGST/SGST/IGST-compliant invoices for India.

Here are the best RepairDesk alternatives for Indian repair shops in 2026.

---

## 1. MobiBix — Best Overall for Indian Repair Shops ⭐

**Price**: ₹999–₹2,999/month
**Best for**: Mobile repair shops in India, UAE, and Southeast Asia

MobiBix is purpose-built for Indian and MENA repair shops. It is the only repair shop software that combines:

- **WhatsApp Business API** — automated repair status notifications to customers
- **GST billing** — CGST, SGST, and IGST auto-calculated, print-ready invoices
- **UPI & Razorpay** — collect payments digitally, no cash counting
- **Job card management** — intake, tech assignment, status tracking, delivery
- **IMEI inventory** — track every device from purchase to sale to repair
- **Multi-shop** — manage all branches from one dashboard

**Why it beats RepairDesk for India**: 6× cheaper, WhatsApp-native, GST-ready, and India-time support.

[Start MobiBix Free →](https://REMOVED_DOMAIN/auth/signup)

---

## 2. RepairShopr — Good for Computer Repair, Not Mobile

**Price**: $49–$149/month (~₹4,000–₹12,300)
**Best for**: Computer and laptop repair shops in the US

RepairShopr has a strong ticketing system but shares RepairDesk's blindspots for India — no WhatsApp, no GST, no UPI. Better value than RepairDesk, but still priced in USD.

---

## 3. Orderry — Affordable Eastern Europe Option

**Price**: $19–$99/month (~₹1,600–₹8,200)
**Best for**: Small repair shops in Eastern Europe

Orderry is cheaper than RepairDesk but is designed for European markets. English interface, no WhatsApp, no India-specific billing.

---

## 4. Vyapar — For General Billing Only

**Price**: ₹400–₹800/month
**Best for**: General retailers needing basic GST billing

Vyapar generates GST invoices but is NOT a repair shop system. No job cards, no IMEI tracking, no WhatsApp notifications, no technician management.

---

## 5. Custom WhatsApp + Excel (DIY)

**Price**: Free (but costs you hours every day)

Many repair shops use WhatsApp Business + Excel. This breaks down the moment you have more than 5 repairs/day. You lose track of jobs, customers get frustrated, and collecting payments becomes chaotic.

---

## Verdict

If you are an Indian mobile repair shop owner, **MobiBix is the clear winner**. It is the only software that was built from the ground up for India — with WhatsApp, GST, UPI, and INR pricing.

RepairDesk charges 6× more while missing the three features Indian shops need most.
